===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Grant Clemont Adventures.png|thumb|270px|Clemont in Pokémon Adventures]]
===={{MangaArc|X & Y}}====
Clemont debuted in ''[[PS563|Charging After Electrike]]''. He was first seen in [[Cyllage City]] alongside [[Grant]], who was helping him find {{type|Electric}} Pokémon to power the [[Prism Tower]] during a blackout. After witnessing {{kal|Grace}}, a famous {{p|Rhyhorn}} racer, being found and taken away by several {{tc|Team Flare Grunt}}s, the two were left wondering what happened. In ''[[PS565|Fast-Thinking Froakie]]'', Clemont found Grace's daughter, {{adv|Y}}, and her friends chasing an [[Élec|Electrike]] on {{rt|5|Kalos}}. After {{p|Electrike}} was defeated, it evolved into a {{p|Manectric}} and revealed it wanted Y to retrieve a [[Manectite]] stuck in a tree. Overhearing the commotion, Clemont introduced himself and offered to help get the [[Mega Stone]] in Y's place. Before Clemont could grab the stone, a Team Flare Grunt stole it and fled, causing a tree to fall on top of Clemont. {{adv|X}} and {{adv|Trevor}} went after the Grunt while Y helped free Clemont, who revealed what he saw happened to Grace in Cyllage.

In ''[[PS567|Morphing Manectric]]'', Clemont and the others were saved by [[Cassius]], who defeated the Grunt's four {{p|Espurr}}. With the Espurr held captive, a curious Clemont took checked to see what was under their ears, causing him to be sent flying by the Espurr's unrestrained psychic power. The Grunt that stole the Manectite later found Clemont's unconscious body and captured him. In ''[[PS572|Shooting Frogadier]]'', Clemont awakened in the [[Team Flare Secret HQ]], where he was greeted by [[Xerosic]], one of Team Flare's scientists. Xerosic freed Clemont from his bindings and ordered him to build a machine for Team Flare. Clemont initially refused, but was forced to comply after seeing Xerosic use his {{TP|Clemont|Heliolisk}} as a hostage.

In ''[[PS577|Quilladin Stands]]'', the device was finished and given to [[Lysandre]]. With Clemont having served his purpose, Xerosic order some Grunts to throw the boy down an incinerator chute. Using his {{p|Aipom}} Arm's camera function, Clemont discovered the Secret HQ was located in [[Geosenge Town]]. Around the same time in [[Laverre City]], X received a pair of glasses belonging to Clemont from a wild {{p|Klefki}}. Using the glasses, he also discovered where the Secret HQ was hidden and set out to confront Team Flare. 

In ''[[PS580|Flabébé Blooms]]'', Trevor, {{adv|Tierno}}, and {{adv|Shauna}} made it inside the Secret HQ, where they reunited with Clemont and freed [[AZ]], a giant man that was held prisoner. Clemont helped launch Trevor and the others to where the [[ultimate weapon]]'s key was held, but they were unable to pull it out in time before it fired. To Lysandre's frustration, the combined efforts of X, his friends, and the [[Gym Leader]]s successfully weakened the ultimate weapon, preventing it from taking any innocent lives. AZ stayed behind to allow [[Xerxer|Xerneas]] to take Clemont and the others back to the surface. Once Xerneas joined Y, they attempted to destroy the ultimate weapon, but were interrupted by [[Malva]] and her {{p|Yveltal}}. Due to Xerneas and Yveltal being evenly matched, Xerosic announced that Lysandre ordered a ceasefire. Xerxer confirmed this and retreated, taking everyone with it. 

In ''[[PS582|Pinsir Glares]]'', [[Ramos]] revealed that Team Flare blamed the destruction caused by the ultimate weapon on the Gym Leaders and the [[Vaniville Town|Vaniville]] children. X and his friends were advised to keep out of the public's eye while the Gym Leaders helped rebuild the damaged areas. In ''[[PS592|Zygarde Agitated]]'', Clemont, [[Bonnie]], [[Alexa]], [[Viola]], and [[Yvette]] confronted Team Flare at {{rt|10|Kalos}}. Together, the group managed to successfully free the Pokémon Team Flare had captured. After Team Flare was fully defeated, Clemont and his allies met with X and his friends at [[Lumiose City]] to congratulate them on their victory. He and Bonnie returned Furry, {{adv|Shauna}}'s missing {{p|Furfrou}}, to its Trainer. Clemont also gave Trevor [[Malva's Delphox]], who they faced on Route 10, due to Furry recognizing it as an ally.

===={{MangaArc|Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun & Ultra Moon}}====
Clemont was mentioned by [[Professor Kukui]] in ''[[PASM03|Pokémon Move Specialist Professor Kukui]]'' as the one that invented the [[Rotom Pokédex]].
